title: 硝子の少女は遊びたい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Mejiro Ardan browsing the
general goods corner of the school store.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Playing cards, Othello... Marbles? Oh,
which one would be the most fun?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm sorry, I didn't mean to speak out loud...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Um... I hate to ask this out of the blue, but... do
you know of any games that are fun to play
indoors?
choice_data_list: Are you only looking for indoor activities?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. To be honest, my body is quite frail, so my
friends are hesitant to invite me out for things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, I'd like to find something I can
easily play so I can invite them myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, I really don't know what's popular
nowadays... What do you think would be good?
choice_data_list: Why not film videos for Umatok?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Karuta? Ooh, I haven't played that in years. I
used to do One Hundred Poets, One Poem Each
all the time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do people still enjoy playing karuta, though? It's
not a very contemporary game, after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance over the shelves and happen to see a
karuta set with a unique theme. I take a pack of
the cards down and offer it to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huh, what's this? Legendary Umamusume Karuta?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
"Includes all the Umamusume of the past and
present!" Wow! I never knew they sold versions
like this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... What do they have for "O"? Oh, here it is.
"Oguri Cap, Kasamatsu's Gray Cinderella."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Pfft! Hehehe! I wonder if they have a card about
me in here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure my friends will love this! Thank you for
telling me about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this will help us create plenty of
memories. Hopefully this will make up for all the
days I couldn't spend time with them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A beautiful smile spreads across Mejiro Ardan's
face as she murmurs her heartfelt wish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Umatok? I've only heard about it in passing from
my classmates...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind showing me how to make a
video?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lovey-dovey love! ♪ Bang! ♪ Straight into your
heart! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Straight, um... Straight into your heart! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Am I doing it right? This is quite embarrassing, I
have to say...
choice_data_list: Hang on. I need to edit it real quick.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! How fun. I can't believe this is what's
popular nowadays.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But this way, I can have fun with everyone even
from my room!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan smiles widely as if she can barely
contain her excitement.
